features.name: local_temperature
features.label: Local temperature
features.description: Current temperature measured on the device

features.name: local_temperature_calibration
features.label: Local temperature calibration
features.description: Offset to add/subtract to the local temperature

Exposes.name: temperature_setpoint_hold
Exposes.label: Temperature setpoint hold
Exposes.description: Prevent changes. `false` = run normally. `true` = prevent from making changes.

Exposes.name: temperature_setpoint_hold_duration
Exposes.label: Temperature setpoint hold duration
Exposes.description: Period in minutes for which the setpoint hold will be active (65535 - forever)

Exposes.name: valve_detection
Exposes.label: Valve detection
Exposes.description: Determines if temperature control abnormalities should be detected

Exposes.name: window_detection
Exposes.label: Window detection
Exposes.description: Enables/disables window detection on the device

Exposes.name: child_lock
Exposes.label: Child lock
Exposes.description: Enables/disables physical input on the device

Exposes.name: position
Exposes.label: Position
Exposes.description: Position of the valve, 100% is fully open

15820.VariableValue: Fix known issues and optimize the experience.
